Settings · Master data

Load this before you build

Watch first · how Tread works

A quick overview from Tim — then we’ll load your data together.

Company hierarchy

All master data lives at the parent level — confirm your structure first.
Single companyParent / child
Most teams use a single company. When does parent/child make sense? If you think you need it, reach out to success@tread.io.
